lesson.menu_desc: Sharing your career and background with a new colleague -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 2 -- Talking About Your Experience
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Patrícia Xavier Lima Iwashita | Aula 2 -- Talking About Your Experience

listenings.text: Hi Patrícia, it is great to finally meet you. I have worked in customer success for about ten years now. I started my career in technical support, and later I moved into account management. Previously, I worked at a smaller software company for five years. I have led several big projects, and I have handled many difficult clients. So far, this is the best team I have ever worked with. I am really looking forward to working with you.

Hi Patrícia, this is Sandra from the global onboarding team. I just wanted to introduce myself before our call tomorrow. I have been with the company for three years, and I have supported more than thirty premium accounts. Last year, I managed the onboarding for two of our biggest clients in Europe. Recently, I joined the customer experience group, so we will work together often. I have heard great things about your background. Talk to you soon.
